extra.reason: Seeded 74 exercises / 203 variations to Firestore (pumppal-c9199), meta version 2. Orphaned test-exercise doc deleted. Collection verified at 74 docs.
Removed Exercises section label and Exercise N per-card label from log workout modal.
Removed Type of Exercise visible label from log workout modal.
Moved exercise remove icon to footer beside bodyweight toggle and made Add Exercise visually bolder.
Implemented adjacent set grouping in workout detail modal and verified with lint.
Restored old side-by-side workout detail styling while preserving stacked set groups.
Removed recent split label from exercise picker.
Exercise picker recents and search lists now sort alphabetically.
Added subtle red glow styling to home Up Next card.
Changed Up Next button to an internal black-to-red gradient and kept content readable.
Replaced full gradient with an internal red glow layer inside the Up Next button.
Changed Up Next effect to red inner-edge glow fading inward from all four sides.
Phase A shipped: status field, plan mode in modal, planned-workouts queue screen, Home wiring
Active workout view shipped: start from plan/blank, resume in_progress, per-set completion, autosave, finish (drops incomplete sets, writes date+completed), discard (revert to planned or delete)
Implemented blue Home Plan Workout card, queue-tail prediction, planned-view prefill, and latest matching completed-workout cloning. Lint passes with zero errors.
Added reduced-motion-aware loading-plates animation, dedicated new-plan prefill state, 500ms minimum display, failure fallback, and Save gating. Lint passes with zero errors.
Follow-up applied: inner plates load first, background circle removed, and animation restyled with Pump Pal reds. Lint passes with zero errors.
Follow-up applied: plate size now increases toward the center, with innermost plates largest. Lint passes with zero errors.
Follow-up applied: removed gray collars beside innermost plates. Lint passes with zero errors.

Follow-up applied: changing workout type in plan mode now shows the same 500ms loader and replaces exercises with the latest completed matching workout, or a blank row when none exists. Lint passes with zero errors.
About page split into Split/Account/App sub-pages, tab renamed and re-iconed, lint clean

Implemented shared Timber first-run visual shell and refreshed welcome, auth, phone auth, and split setup copy/layout. Lint passes with pre-existing warnings; TypeScript check remains blocked only by existing Firebase SDK import.
Added README instructions for preview APK builds, direct download, EAS preview updates, environment setup, native rebuild boundaries, and Beads Git clone workaround.
Installed Expo SDK-compatible expo-insights dependency.
Migrated AI calls to AI SDK Core with Google provider registry, structured Zod outputs, generic module names/config, docs updates, lint verification, and graphify refresh.
Simplified Google structured-output schema, added AI retries and development diagnostics, raised temporary daily limits to 999 for testing, and verified lint/diff/graphify.
Verified Gemini key/model returns JSON directly; configured Google AI SDK provider to use Expo native fetch, avoiding the React Native global fetch body truncation that produced a 200 '.' response.
Restored shared daily AI refresh allowance to 3; both muscle-insight and workout-suggestion UI read this constant.
Implemented injury data model, About UI (settings-injuries under Split), per-workout auto-attach. Lint+typecheck clean (only pre-existing firebase typing error). Analytics/AI deferred.
